overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic urban downtown during golden hour. The player navigates from a plaza with a distinctive red rose mural, through narrow alleys with graffiti, and onto a sunlit boulevard with heavy digital billboard presence and moderate vehicle traffic.

events.description: turning right to enter narrow alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking through an urban plaza toward a large red rose mural painted on a building wall

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi parked along the curb
pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead of the player

entered.detail: large red rose painted on concrete wall with hand holding stem
futuristic yellow taxi cab parked on the street
tall dark building with horizontal window strips
large illuminated advertisement screen showing colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The player begins in an urban plaza during golden hour, walking toward a prominent red rose mural on a building wall. A yellow taxi is parked on the right, and a few pedestrians are scattered around the area. The player turns right to enter a narrow alleyway.

events.description: entering narrow alley with closed shutters and graffiti
emerging from shadow into area with overhead highway structure visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow alleyway with graffiti-covered walls and closed storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead into the alley

entered.detail: wall with large teal V logo and skeletal hand graffiti
rolled down metal security shutters on storefronts
elevated highway or monorail track overhead
stacked cardboard boxes and debris against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow enclosed alley with graffiti-covered walls including a prominent V logo. Closed metal shutters line the left side, and cardboard boxes are stacked against the walls. The overhead highway structure becomes visible as the player emerges from the deep shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street with overhead transit structure

events.description: passing digital billboards mounted on the left wall
approaching brighter area at end of the urban canyon

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow urban canyon with overhead highway structures and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the adjacent road

entered.detail: vertical digital advertisement screen displaying animated content
tall street light pole with horizontal arm
tall building with construction cranes visible in distance

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a long urban canyon with an overhead highway structure casting shadows. Digital billboards including a prominent NCola advertisement line the left wall. The street is moderately crowded with pedestrians, and futuristic vehicles pass by on the right. The scene gradually brightens as the player approaches the end of the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban boulevard with heavy traffic

events.description: exiting narrow canyon into wide sunlit intersection
crossing the multi-lane road with traffic moving through intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing a busy intersection and continuing along a sunlit sidewalk with heavy vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the road
blue sedan waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements
wide asphalt road with multiple lanes and red curbs
tall pole with traffic signals and crosswalk lights

segments.scene_description: The player exits the narrow canyon into a wide, sunlit intersection with full sky visibility. Large digital billboards dominate the left side of the street. The player crosses the multi-lane road, navigating around moderate vehicle traffic including a red sports car and blue sedan, then continues along the sunlit sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet urban plaza through a shadowed industrial corridor and into a sprawling, sunlit metropolitan intersection. It begins in a golden-hour plaza, moving past a parked yellow taxi toward a prominent red rose mural before turning right into a narrow alleyway. As the camera enters this enclosed space, the environment shifts to deep shadow and graffiti-covered walls featuring a V logo and stacked cardboard boxes, eventually revealing an overhead highway structure. The scene then expands into a long urban canyon where digital billboards and NCola advertisements line the walls, with the lighting gradually brightening as the camera passes futuristic vehicles and pedestrians. Finally, the view opens completely into a wide, sunlit intersection under a clear sky, crossing a multi-lane road filled with red and blue cars to continue along a bright sidewalk dominated by massive digital displays.
